inputs.text: Mujhe bukhar hai, sir dard ho raha hai, thoda thakaan mehsoos ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can also present with similar symptoms

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, Typhoid is less likely at this stage without more specific symptoms

inputs.text: Mujhe bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard ho raha hai, kabz hai

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain and constipation are common in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever can still be a possibility

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and abdominal symptoms could suggest Typhoid, but more specific symptoms are needed

inputs.text: Mujhe tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai, bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Tez bukhar, kabz ke baad dast, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of Typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis is less likely given the specific progression of symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is possible but less likely without a clear history of mosquito exposure or other specific symptoms

inputs.text: Mujhe abhi bhi bukhar hai, bahut thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, pet dard badh gaya hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Continued high fever, exhaustion, and abdominal pain confirm the diagnosis of Typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific progression of symptoms and the presence of petechiae

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the lack of specific symptoms and the presence of petechiae which is more suggestive of Typhoid
